---
title: "ART Feature Status"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML, display

_candidates = [Path("data/art-feature-status.json"), Path("../data/art-feature-status.json")]
data_file = next((p for p in _candidates if p.exists()), None)
if data_file is None:
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "data/art-feature-status.json not found. "
        "Run: python NceGitLab.py --report art-feature-status"
    )

d              = json.loads(data_file.read_text())
group          = d["group"]
value_streams  = d["value_streams"]
```

```{python}
HTML(f"""
<p>
  <strong>Report Date:</strong> {d['report_date']} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>Group:</strong> <a href="{group['url']}" target="_blank">{group['name']}</a>
</p>
<p>All Features per ART, grouped by Team, with completion %, PI progress, and risk flags.</p>
""")
```

```{python}
if not value_streams:
    display(HTML("<p><em>No Feature data found. Ensure Features are assigned to teams via group membership.</em></p>"))
else:
    html = ""
    for vs in value_streams:
        html += f"<h2>🔷 {vs['vs_name']}</h2>"
        for art in vs["arts"]:
            art_link = (f'<a href="{art["art_url"]}" target="_blank">{art["art_name"]}</a>'
                        if art["art_url"] else art["art_name"])
            flags = []
            if art["at_risk"]:
                flags.append(f"⚠️ {art['at_risk']} at risk")
            if art["blocked"]:
                flags.append(f"🔒 {art['blocked']} blocked")
            flag_str = " &nbsp;·&nbsp; ".join(flags)
            html += f"<h3>{art_link} &nbsp;<small style='font-weight:normal'>({art['total_features']} features"
            if flag_str:
                html += f" &nbsp;·&nbsp; {flag_str}"
            html += ")</small></h3>"

            for team in art["teams"]:
                team_link = (f'<a href="{team["team_url"]}" target="_blank">{team["team_name"]}</a>'
                             if team["team_url"] else team["team_name"])
                html += f"<h4>{team_link}</h4>"
                if not team["features"]:
                    html += "<p><em>No features assigned to this team.</em></p>"
                    continue
                html += (
                    '<table class="table table-sm table-bordered" style="font-size:0.85em">'
                    "<thead><tr>"
                    "<th>Feature</th><th>PI</th><th>State</th>"
                    "<th>% Done</th><th>PI Elapsed</th><th>Weight</th>"
                    "<th>Status</th><th>At Risk Reason</th>"
                    "</tr></thead><tbody>"
                )
                for f in team["features"]:
                    feat_link  = f'<a href="{f["url"]}" target="_blank">{f["title"]}</a>'
                    pi_elapsed = f"{f['pct_pi']}%" if f["pct_pi"] is not None else "—"
                    weight_str = f"{f['planned']}pt → {f['actual']}pt"
                    html += (
                        f"<tr>"
                        f"<td>{feat_link}</td>"
                        f"<td>{f['piid']}</td>"
                        f"<td>{f['state']}</td>"
                        f"<td>{f['pct_complete']}%</td>"
                        f"<td>{pi_elapsed}</td>"
                        f"<td>{weight_str}</td>"
                        f"<td>{f['status']}</td>"
                        f"<td>{f['risk_reason']}</td>"
                        f"</tr>"
                    )
                html += "</tbody></table>"
    display(HTML(html))
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Legend

- **% Done** — closed issue weight ÷ total issue weight for all issues linked to this Feature
- **PI Elapsed** — how far through the PI quarter today falls: `(today − PI start) ÷ (PI end − PI start) × 100`
- **Weight** — Planned pt → Actual pt (planned set via GraphQL; actual = sum of linked issue weights)
- **✅ On Track** — % Done ≥ PI Elapsed for the current PI
- **⚠️ At Risk** — % Done < PI Elapsed for the current PI
- **✅ Complete** / **❌ Incomplete** — outcome for a past PI
- **🔵 Planned** — future PI or PI not yet started
- **🔒 Blocked** — Feature has one or more active blocking relationships
:::
